features.name: reduction_xor_on_input_port_in_expression
features.description: Code should include a reduction XOR operator applied to an input port variable used in an expression

features.name: bitwise_and_constant_with_reduction_result
features.description: Code should include a bitwise AND operation between a multi-bit constant and a reduction operator result

features.name: ternary_operator_with_always_zero_condition
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where the condition always evaluates to zero due to bitwise operations on constants

features.name: procedural_assignment_in_sequential_always_block
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking procedural assignment within a clocked always block
